name: InvestigationLoop
description: Plans an investigation, asks targeted user questions, executes the next selected ability, and stops when the recorded acceptance criteria are satisfied.

steps.name: planInvestigation
steps.description: Establish the current open questions, acceptance criteria, and the next investigation step from persisted loop state.
steps.promptTemplate:
Plan the current investigation turn from persisted state only. Use the exact markdown structure below, then emit exactly one routing keyword. Treat the latest recorded user response as authoritative when it clarifies the goal, scope, or stopping conditions. Do not ask the same kickoff question again if the user already answered it. Route to REQUEST_USER_INPUT only when a specific blocking question remains after considering the latest recorded response.

Required markdown structure:
# Investigation Loop State

## Request Summary
<concise restatement of the user's request and current scope>

## Open Questions
- <active unanswered question or `None`>

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] <criterion needed before the loop can stop>

## Completion Assessment
<state whether the current information satisfies the acceptance criteria and why>

## Next Ability
<name the next ability or step and why>

## Routing Keyword
<one of REQUEST_USER_INPUT, GATHER_CONTEXT, GENERATE_IDEAS, DRAFT_PROPOSAL, COMPLETE>

Ability Guidance:
{AbilityBlocks}

Original request:
{userPrompt}

Loop state:
{LoopState}

Latest recorded user response:
{LatestUserResponse}

Recorded user responses:
{UserResponses}

Current findings:
{Findings}

Current ideas:
{Ideas}

Current proposal draft:
{ProposalDraft}

steps.name: requestUserInput
steps.description: Ask the minimum next user questions needed to resolve open questions and refine the loop acceptance criteria.

steps.name: gatherContext
steps.description: Use the context-gathering ability to collect only the evidence needed to close current open questions.
steps.promptTemplate:
Gather only the evidence needed to address the current open questions and move the investigation toward its acceptance criteria. Use the exact markdown structure below, then emit exactly one routing keyword.

Required markdown structure:
# Findings

## Evidence
<key facts, code observations, or document findings>

## Resolved Questions
- <resolved question or `None`>

## Remaining Gaps
- <remaining gap or `None`>

## Routing Keyword
<one of REQUEST_USER_INPUT, GENERATE_IDEAS, DRAFT_PROPOSAL, COMPLETE>

Ability Guidance:
{AbilityBlocks}

Original request:
{userPrompt}

Loop state:
{LoopState}

Recorded user responses:
{UserResponses}

Existing findings:
{Findings}

steps.name: generateIdeas
steps.description: Use the alternative-generation ability to turn findings into materially different candidate approaches.
steps.promptTemplate:
Generate materially different candidate approaches using the current findings, open questions, and acceptance criteria. Use the exact markdown structure below, then emit exactly one routing keyword.

Required markdown structure:
# Ideas

## Recommended
<recommended approach>

## Deferred
- <deferred option or `None`>

## Rejected
- <rejected option or `None`>

## Decision Gaps
- <gap that still blocks a decision or `None`>

## Routing Keyword
<one of REQUEST_USER_INPUT, GATHER_CONTEXT, DRAFT_PROPOSAL, COMPLETE>

Ability Guidance:
{AbilityBlocks}

Original request:
{userPrompt}

Loop state:
{LoopState}

Current findings:
{Findings}

Existing ideas:
{Ideas}

steps.name: draftProposal
steps.description: Use the proposal-drafting ability to turn the current loop state into a working draft.
steps.promptTemplate:
Draft or revise the working proposal using the current request summary, acceptance criteria, findings, and ideas. Use the exact markdown structure below, then emit exactly one routing keyword.

Required markdown structure:
# Proposal Draft

## Problem Statement
...

## Resolution
...

## Risks
- ...

## Outstanding Questions
- ...

## Routing Keyword
<one of REQUEST_USER_INPUT, GATHER_CONTEXT, GENERATE_IDEAS, COMPLETE>

Ability Guidance:
{AbilityBlocks}

Original request:
{userPrompt}

Loop state:
{LoopState}

Current findings:
{Findings}

Current ideas:
{Ideas}

Existing proposal draft:
{ProposalDraft}

steps.name: complete
steps.description: Stop only when the recorded acceptance criteria are satisfied; otherwise send the loop back to the missing work.
